weekly_goals.goal: Understand the basics of organic chemistry, including the definition, importance, and historical background of the field.
topics: History and Importance of Organic Chemistry

weekly_goals.goal: Master the concepts of atomic structure, molecular orbitals, and types of chemical bonds.
topics: Types of Chemical Bonds in Organic Molecules

weekly_goals.goal: Learn about alkanes, including their structure, nomenclature, and physical properties.
Understand the concepts of stereochemistry, including isomers, configuration, and conformation.
Study the reactions of alkanes, including combustion, substitution, and elimination reactions.
Explore the structure, nomenclature, and properties of alkenes and alkynes.
topics: Structure and Nomenclature of Alkenes and Alkynes
Physical Properties and Sources of Alkenes and Alkynes

weekly_goals.goal: Understand the concepts of reaction mechanisms, including types of reactions and reaction conditions.
Learn about alcohols and thiols, including their structure, nomenclature, and properties.
topics: Structure and Nomenclature of Alcohols and Thiols
Physical Properties and Uses of Alcohols and Thiols

weekly_goals.goal: Study the structure, nomenclature, and reactions of ethers and epoxides.
topics: Structure and Nomenclature of Ethers and Epoxides
Physical Properties and Uses of Ethers and Epoxides

weekly_goals.goal: Explore the concepts of functional group transformations, including oxidation, reduction, and substitution reactions.
Understand the applications of organic chemistry to real-world problems, including pharmaceuticals, materials science, and environmental issues.
topics: Applications of Organic Chemistry in Pharmaceuticals
Applications of Organic Chemistry in Materials Science

weekly_goals.goal: Review and synthesize the key concepts learned throughout the course, preparing for final assessment.
topics: Comprehensive Review of Organic Chemistry Concepts
